'''Falcon Base''' was a large [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base located on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], consisting of [[prefab shelter]]s, a [[Factory/Legends|mech factory]] and three [[Barracks/Legends|Troop centers]]. It was heavily protected by turrets, [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]], [[Tauntaun Trooper|cavalry units]], and [[T1-B hovertank]]s, but was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his forces during the [[Evacuation of Yavin]]. It was located in close proximity to [[Raven Base]].

==Behind the scenes==
Falcon Base appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]] during the Darth Vader campaign.
